idea-plugin.name: SQLAlchemy Templates
idea-plugin.description:
This plugin add templates for SQLAlchemy.
You can use bundled file template group "SQLAlchemy" to create new SQLAlchemy files with predefined structure and boilerplate code.
The templates are designed to help you quickly set up new SQLAlchemy files, saving you time and ensuring consistency across your projects.
To use the templates, simply go to "File" -> "New" -> "SQLAlchemy" and select the desired template from the list. The new file will be created with the predefined structure and boilerplate code, allowing you to focus on writing your SQLAlchemy code without worrying about the initial setup.

action.description: Generate a new SQLAlchemy model file from a template
